message:
fix: switch Anthropic adapter to automatic prompt caching

Prompt caching is now GA — the prompt-caching-2024-07-31 beta header is
no longer needed. Replace manual addCacheControlBreakpoint on conversation
prefixes with top-level cache_control on the request body. Explicit
breakpoints are retained on the system prompt and last tool for independent
cache segments. Remove the auto_cache opt-out mechanism (always enabled,
nothing used the opt-out).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
